exercises.title: Repetition Code Encoder/Decoder
exercises.description: Implement encoding and decoding for the n-bit repetition code.
tasks: Create encoding/decoding functions for bit strings
exercises.expectedOutput: Working encoder and decoder with error reporting
hints: For even n, define tie-breaking rule

exercises.title: Error Probability Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate and visualize error probabilities for repetition codes.
tasks: Calculate P(decode error) for n-bit code with error rate p
Plot error probability vs code length
hints: Use Monte Carlo simulation to verify

exercises.title: Syndrome-Based Decoder
exercises.description: Implement syndrome decoding for the repetition code.
exercises.expectedOutput: Syndrome decoder matching majority voting results
hints: H checks if adjacent bits are equal

exercises.title: Channel Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate transmission through a noisy channel.
tasks: Find optimal code length for given error rate
hints: BSC: flip each bit with probability p
Run many trials for accurate statistics
Longer codes = better correction but worse rate
Consider both error rate and throughput
